350.error:
(414) Reason: Request-URI Too Large HTTP response headers: HTTPHeaderDict({'Server': 'awselb/2.0', 'Date': 'Sun, 14 Jun 2026 16:44:20 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'text/html', 'Content-Length': '142', 'Connection': 'close'}) HTTP response body: 414 Request-URI Too Large

414 Request-URI Too Large

diagnosis: pipeline_progress_report.py batches Pinecone fetch at 1000 IDs; Pinecone starts returning HTTP 414 Request-URI Too Large around 350 IDs for this dataset, so the script silently reports 0 coverage for large sets.
recommended_fix: Reduce fetch batch size to 100 or use metadata-filter coverage queries.
